meaning: 舞台场面设计,舞台调度;舞台调度,舞台场面调度设计;模块化
examples: The Taliban are blocking food deliveries to central Afghanistan.
The door opened, blocking his forward movement.
With no minivan blocking your garage, you have room for that Corvette convertible.
And so in some parts, yes, there's sort of off-and-on implementation then blocking progress.
